questions: You mentioned getting stressed about the MCP RC spec finalizing at the same time you needed to build—walk me through how that pressure actually changed your decisions, or did it turn out not to matter once you picked Supabase?

The two deliberately unsubstantiated seed claims feel like a deliberate choice for next week's adversary to attack. Why plant failure cases now instead of discovering them naturally when the adversarial agent runs?
You split capabilities between MCP tools and Agent Skills pretty deliberately—what would have gone wrong if you'd put the procedural review knowledge into an MCP tool instead of a Skill?
